summary: Make Tag from being Available to Group
description: Makes a Resource Planning Tag from being Available to a given Group

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

items.description: Response schema containing a list of Group IDs.

group_ids.description: Array of unique identifiers for Groups.

schema.description: Request body schema for making a Tag available to Groups.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs for which Groups this Tag should be available to or removed from, depending on the context. If `globally_accessible` is true, this can be an empty array.
